summary: Tested new driver login page, admin office locations management, and geo-lock features. All core features working. Found one bug: driver login page redirects to home instead of showing error when non-driver account logs in.

ui_bugs.issue: When non-driver account (admin/pharmacy) logs in via /Driver/Login, page redirects to home page instead of showing error message. The ApiService.logout() function always redirects to '/' which overrides the error display logic.

action_items: Fix driver login page to show error message when non-driver account logs in instead of redirecting to home. The ApiService.logout() should not redirect when called from driver login page context.
critical_code_review_comments: Driver Login page at /Driver/Login is mobile-optimized with proper viewport meta tags and responsive CSS
Office Locations CRUD API endpoints work correctly (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Driver portal /api/driver-portal/office-locations endpoint returns active offices for geo-lock
Geo-status indicator shows on driver dashboard (shows 'Location unavailable' in headless browser as expected)
Admin Office Locations page has geocoding feature via Nominatim API
seed_data_creation: Default office 'Main Office - NYC Hub' with coordinates 40.7128, -74.0060 was seeded and verified
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Separate driver login at /Driver/Login - works and redirects to /Driver/Index on success. 2) Admin Office Locations at /Admin/Offices - full CRUD working. 3) Driver portal office-locations API returns active offices. 4) Geo-status indicator shows on driver dashboard. One bug: non-driver login on driver page redirects to home instead of showing error.

evidence: Page loads with mobile-friendly design
data-testid attributes present for email, password, submit
Driver badge shows 'Driver Portal'
Login with driver credentials redirects to /Driver/Index
After successful driver login, URL changes to /Driver/Index
Driver dashboard loads with deliveries, tabs, and geo-status
API correctly returns role (Admin/Pharmacy/Driver)
BUG: When admin logs in via driver login, page redirects to home instead of showing error
The logout() function in ApiService always redirects to '/' which overrides error display
Page loads with stats (Total Offices, Active Offices, Default Office)
Office cards display with name, address, coordinates, radius
Add Office button present with data-testid
GET /api/admin/office-locations returns offices array
Each office has id, name, address, city, state, postalCode, latitude, longitude, radiusMeters, isActive, isDefault
POST /api/admin/office-locations creates new office
Modal form has all required fields with data-testid
Geocoding button 'Get Coordinates from Address' present
Success toast shows after creation
PUT /api/admin/office-locations/{id} updates office
Edit button present on office cards
DELETE /api/admin/office-locations/{id} removes office
Delete button present on non-default office cards
Cannot delete default office (API returns error)
GET /api/driver-portal/office-locations returns active offices
Response includes id, name, address, city, latitude, longitude, radiusMeters, isDefault
#geo-status element present on driver dashboard
Shows 'Location unavailable' in headless browser (expected)
CSS classes for at-office, away, error states defined
Driver login page renders correctly at 390x844 viewport
Driver dashboard renders correctly at 390x844 viewport
Tabs and geo-status visible on mobile
